definition: A place where people study for a degree
A qualification from a university
example: He has a degree in computer science.

definition: A test of knowledge or ability
example: I have a math exam next week.

definition: Work you do at home for school
example: I have a lot of homework tonight.

definition: A period of learning in school
An area of knowledge studied in school
A person who teaches in a school
A person who is studying at a school or university
A series of lessons about a subject
A building with books you can borrow
Careful study to discover new facts
example: She did research for her thesis.

definition: A short piece of writing on a subject
example: I need to write an essay about climate change.

definition: To complete a course of study
example: She graduated from university last year.

definition: To learn about a subject
To succeed in an exam
To not succeed in an exam
Money given to a student to help pay for study
example: She won a scholarship to Oxford.

definition: A half-year period in a school or university
A talk given to a group of students
example: The professor gave an interesting lecture.

definition: The grounds of a university
example: The campus is beautiful in spring.
